basic_details.job_title: Nagaland University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Nagaland University has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Candidates with M.Sc./M.Sc.(Ag) in Plant Pathology/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Life Science with NET-CSIR/UGC/ICAR. Desirable: Experience in Plant pathogen isolation, molecular identification, screening of banana cultivars, bioinformatics. qualification can directly attend the interview on 21 July 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Sc.(Ag) in Plant Pathology/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Life Science with NET-CSIR/UGC/ICAR
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc./M.Sc.(Ag) in Plant Pathology/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Life Science with NET-CSIR/UGC/ICAR. Desirable Experience: Experience in Plant pathogen isolation, molecular identification, screening of banana cultivars, bioinformatics.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month with HRA as per DST OM No. DST/PCPM/Z-06/2022 dated 26.06.2023

content_sections.heading: Nagaland University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Nagaland University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Nagaland University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Nagaland University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Nagaland University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Junior Research Fellow (JRF).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for this position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date is 21 July 2026. Candidates should attend the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- per month with HRA as per DST OM No. DST/PCPM/Z-06/2022 dated 26.06.2023.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have M.Sc./M.Sc.(Ag) in Plant Pathology/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Life Science with NET-CSIR/UGC/ICAR.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any desirable experience mentioned?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable experience includes Plant pathogen isolation, molecular identification, screening of banana cultivars, and bioinformatics.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will be through a Walk-in-interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at Nagaland University, Medziphema, Nagaland - 797106.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should bring all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.
